info.title: happy-backend API
info.description: Standalone backend for the Happy Restaurant POS system. All routes below /api/v1 except the ones marked no-auth (login, refresh, venue-config, health, this document) require a Bearer access token; the venue is always taken from the token, never from the request. Response envelope: success `{ data, meta }`, error `{ error: { code, message, details? } }` — clients must switch on `error.code`, never on `error.message`.

pmsProvider.description: Omitted entirely unless restaurant_settings.pms_enabled is true.

pmsConfig.description: Omitted entirely unless pms_enabled is true.

RestaurantSettings.description: Every configurable behavior for a venue. whatsapp_config/ai_config/pms_room_charge_enabled are omitted entirely (not null) while their gating flag is false.

whatsappConfig.description: Present only when whatsapp_enabled is true.

aiConfig.description: Present only when ai_enabled is true.

pmsRoomChargeEnabled.description: Present only when pms_enabled is true.

taxRatePercent.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

serviceChargePercent.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

displayLabel.description: Derived from table_naming_mode — the client renders this directly.

grandTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

price.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

taxRatePercent.description: Overrides the venue default tax rate when set.

priceDelta.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

MenuTreeCategory.description: GET /menu — one call, the whole active menu, excluding soft-deleted/inactive.

OrderItemModifier.description: Snapshotted at insert — never re-derived from modifier_options.

priceDeltaSnapshot.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

OrderItem.description: item_name_snapshot/category_name_snapshot/unit_price_snapshot/destination_snapshot/tax_rate_snapshot are copied from the menu at insert time and never change when the menu does.

unitPriceSnapshot.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

taxRateSnapshot.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

modifiersTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

lineTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

subtotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

taxTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

serviceChargeTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

discountTotal.description: Always 0 in Phase 1 — no discount feature exists yet.

grandTotal.description: Decimal on the wire — never a string, never client-trusted for totals.

pmsFolioId.description: Omitted entirely unless pms_enabled is true (schema-only in Phase 1 — always null even when present).

tableDisplayLabel.description: null for counter orders. Only present on GET /orders/:id.

DisplayTicket.description: Locked response shape (Prompt 9) — snake_case, sourced entirely from order_item/order_item_modifier snapshot columns, never a join to menu_items.
